templates.intended_use: Future Phase 8.2 fictional actor portrait candidate; not an approved output.
templates.prompt: Editorial illustration, chest-up fictional {role}, diverse plausible adult, neutral institutional background, restrained professional clothing, clear silhouette, non-photorealistic, no text, no logo, no public-figure resemblance, consistent crop and lighting.
templates.negative_prompt: photorealistic public figure, celebrity likeness, real person, logo, trademark, readable text, watermark, medical diagnosis, clinical claim, political campaign symbol, distorted anatomy, extra fingers, duplicated features, violent imagery, hidden simulation state
templates.review_notes: Use only with an approved local model and capture the exact expanded prompt, negative prompt, seed, settings, source output, and human checklist.
